home.title: Palace Roszkowice
home.description: Palace Roszkowice — a 19th-century historic residence in Roszkowice. Estate history, renovation, and planned visitor access.

about.title: About us
about.description: Discover Palace Roszkowice — a 19th-century manor house. Learn about the building's history, renovation, and plans to welcome visitors.

history.title: History
history.description: The history of Palace Roszkowice from the Middle Ages to the von Cramon-Taubadel family. The Battle of Byczyna and the estate's story.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.description: Photos of Palace Roszkowice — interiors, park, renovation, and exterior views. See the historic residence in Roszkowice.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: News and stories about Palace Roszkowice — renovation progress, events, and tales from the Roszkowice estate.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Get in touch with Palace Roszkowice. Address, email, and contact form. Roszkowice 57, Opole Voivodeship, Poland.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.description: Privacy policy for palacroszkowice.pl — how personal data and cookies are handled on this website.
